calendar.description: Calendar entries bridged from the iCalendar standard (RFC 5545). Produced by the calendar adapter when ingesting an external calendar feed into a Pryv account.

ical-event.description: A single iCalendar VEVENT mapped to a Pryv event. The well-known fields are kept here for queryability; the verbatim VEVENT block is preserved in the event's `clientData._raw` for lossless round-trips. The event's own `time` / `duration` carry the canonical instant; `dtstart` / `dtend` mirror it as ISO 8601 strings.

uid.description: VEVENT UID — stable identity used to de-duplicate on re-ingest.

status.description: VEVENT STATUS, e.g. CONFIRMED / TENTATIVE / CANCELLED.

dtend.description: End as an ISO 8601 date-time (UTC), when present.
